name: @refarm.dev/pi-agent

scaffold.reason: uses build:jco instead of build:transpile — non-standard WASM transpile pipeline

description: pi-agent — WASM plugin compiled from Rust via cargo-component

scripts.build:wasm: RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=stable cargo component build --target wasm32-wasip1 --release && mkdir -p dist && cp $(node ../../scripts/ci/cargo-artifact-path.mjs wasm32-wasip1/release/pi_agent.wasm) dist/pi_agent.wasm && node -e "const t=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('plugin.json','utf-8'));delete t._note;require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/plugin.json',JSON.stringify(t,null,2)+'\n');"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:wasm && pnpm run build:jco
scripts.test:integration: echo 'No integration tests for this crate'
